segments.text: Dominion and awe belong to God; He establishes harmony in the heights of heaven.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: Can His troops be numbered? On whom does His light not rise?
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: How then can a man be just before God? How can one born of woman be pure?
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: If even the moon does not shine, and the stars are not pure in His sight,
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: how much less man, who is but a maggot, and the son of man, who is but a worm!
segments.speaker: Unknown
